entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by downy mildew in semiarid regions

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: An economically important disease of pearl millet caused by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where pearl millet downy mildew is prevalent

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pearl millet downy mildew is prevalent

entities.name: AFLP
entities.description: Amplified restriction fragment length polymorphism used to detect genomic and genetic variation

entities.name: GENOMIC VARIATION
entities.description: The extent of variation in the genome among fungal isolates

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where pearl millet cultivars and fungal isolates were studied

entities.name: UPGMA CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: Unweighted pair-group method of averages used for cluster analysis of mildew collections

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COORDINATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to separate mildew collections into distinct groups

entities.name: MATING ABILITIES
entities.description: Characteristic of fungal isolates reflecting pathogen heterogeneity

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The ability of the pathogen to cause disease, reflecting heterogeneity

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Variation in genetic makeup used for selecting isolates and monitoring pathogen changes

entities.name: DISEASE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The overall goal of monitoring pathogen changes and identifying resistant millet
